summary: Code quality refactoring regression test completed. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Dashboard with 5 KPI cards including Net Profit, Historical page with human-readable labels (2026 Week 7 (Feb), February 2026), Allocation Tool with extracted AllocationSettingsPanel component, Inventory Tracker with extracted InventoryTable component, Markets page with copy preset dropdown, Sales Dashboard with 3 export buttons, Manual page with stable string-based keys, Data Repository with snapshot CRUD, Settings page with password change form.

Frontend: Markets page has copy preset dropdown - SUCCESS

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality improvements verified: extracted backend helpers (summarize_sessions, aggregate_market_sales, _period_label, _calc_growth_series, _aggregate_month_market, _month_market_to_rows) working correctly
Extracted frontend components (AllocationSettingsPanel, InventoryTable) rendering correctly
ManualPage uses stable string-based keys instead of array index keys
All 24 useCallback hooks have eslint-disable justification comments (verified in AllocationTool.jsx, InventoryTracker.jsx)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring pass completed. Key changes verified: (1) Backend helpers extracted and working - summarize_sessions, aggregate_market_sales, _period_label, _calc_growth_series, _aggregate_month_market, _month_market_to_rows, (2) Frontend components extracted - AllocationSettingsPanel (used in AllocationTool.jsx), InventoryTable (used in InventoryTracker.jsx), (3) ManualPage uses stable string-based keys (step-{step.slice(0,20)}) instead of array index, (4) All useCallback hooks have eslint-disable comments with justifications. All Phase 1 features from iteration_9 still working correctly.
